---
name: Feature template
about: Properly describe a feature to be implemented in the project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

# 🚀 Task / Issue

## 📌 Summary

Short description of the task or problem.

Example:
"Add login form to the landing page using Firebase authentication."

---

## 🎯 Goal

What should be achieved when this issue is completed?

*
*
*

---

## 🛠 Proposed Approach

(Optional but helpful)
How do you think this should be implemented?

Example:

* Create login component
* Connect to Firebase auth
* Handle errors + loading state

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

What conditions must be met for this issue to be considered complete?

* [ ] Feature works as expected
* [ ] Code runs without errors
* [ ] Integrated with main branch
* [ ] Basic UI styling applied (if applicable)

---

## 📂 Relevant Files / Areas

List files or folders likely involved.

Example:

* `src/components/Login.jsx`
* `src/services/auth.js`

---

## 🔗 Related Issues / PRs

Link anything related.

Example:

* Fixes #
* Related to #

---

## 👤 Assignee

Who is working on this?

* @username

---

## ⏱ Estimated Time

Example: 30 min / 1 hour / 2 hours

---

## 📝 Extra Notes

Anything the team should know (constraints, hacks, TODOs, etc.)
